item.title: POV: You are witnessing a first hand account of Gays stealing the rainbow from god.
item.description: I couldn't imagine worshiping a deity so weak that morals could easily steal from it and not instantly incure its wrath. There is a reason nobody steals from Odin. It's the same reason you don't see any Frost Giants around.
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting

c r i m e s :]
What the fuck is happening in Newcastle jesus christ what are those Geordies doing?
worrying

Christ on a bike.
B E A K
Yeah basically

item.title: One of my favorite actors as a kid of the '90s, Jason Scott Lee
item.description:
Dragon: The Bruce Lee Story (1993)
The Jungle Book (1994)
He played the voice of David Kawena in 2002's "Lilo & Stitch" https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bz3EhKX9Qt0
in one of his earliest film roles, Back to the Future: Part II (1989)
Rapa-Nui (1994)
with co-star Lena Headey
with co-star Lauren Holly
Arabian Nights (2000)
Soldier (1998)
with co-star Tia Carrere from Lilo & Stitch (2002)
with co-star Sean Naegeli, who played 5yr old Mowgli in the beginning of the film
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: What the hell
item.description:
Best friend of nearly 30 years died in his sleep. Old gripe, as you get older you have fewer friends, and it's harder to make new ones. We met through tabletop gaming and throughout the years managed to have consistent groups a few times a month. Works, health, family, 2 ft of snow and glare ice never managed to stop us.. even those times I drove into a ditch on the way home.. Over the years he wasn't the best at managing his health and when we noticed his online presence slacked off we'd start rattling doors to find him. Today his niece found him. He was 52. So many hours of 2nd Ed d&d, hackmaster, our game. Hours of diablo 2, Xbox games. Shit. Well I don't drink so I guess I'll go run some power tools.
Cat tax.. Roxy is 16 and doesn't appreciate change.
item.dc:creator: bacross

item.title: You done fucked up now . . .
item.description: Kill them all. THE LORD WILL KNOW HIS OWN
item.dc:creator: beergeek
